message.fact-value: This Amendment No. 1 to the Annual Report on Form 20-F/A (the “Amendment”) is being filed by NXT Energy Solutions Inc. (the “Com...

entry.message: [add_facts_to_instance] This Amendment No. 1 to the Annual Report on Form 20-F/A (the “Amendment”) is being filed by NXT Energy Solutions Inc. (the “Company,” “NXT”, “we,” “our,” or “us”) to amend the Company’s Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023, originally filed with the U.S. Securities Exchange Commission (the “SEC”) on April 26, 2024 (the “Original Filing”). The Amendment sets forth the information in the Original Filing in its entirety, as adjusted for the changes described below. As previously disclosed, on April 25, 2023, KPMG LLP informed NXT that it declined to stand for reappointment as NXT’s independent auditor for the audit of the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023. The Company is filing this Amendment to: (i) Address an omission in the Original Filing: The Company did not include an audit report for KPMG LLP for the financial statements for the fiscal years December 31, 2022 and 2021, which audit report is now being included in the Amendment in Exhibit 15.1; and (ii)Include a consent from KPMG LLP as Exhibit 15.5. Except as described above, no other changes have been made to the Original Filing. Otherwise, this Amendment speaks as of the date of the Original Filing, and does not modify, amend or update any other item or disclosures in the Original Filing. As such, this Amendment does not reflect events occurring after the filing of the Original Filing or modify or update those disclosures affected by subsequent events. The Company’s Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer are providing currently dated revised certifications as Exhibits 12.1, 12.2, 13.1 and 13.2 in connection with this Amendment. - nxt_20f.htm 2

property.name: value
property.value: This Amendment No. 1 to the Annual Report on Form 20-F/A (the “Amendment”) is being filed by NXT Energy Solutions Inc. (the “Company,” “NXT”, “we,” “our,” or “us”) to amend the Company’s Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023, originally filed with the U.S. Securities Exchange Commission (the “SEC”) on April 26, 2024 (the “Original Filing”). The Amendment sets forth the information in the Original Filing in its entirety, as adjusted for the changes described below. As previously disclosed, on April 25, 2023, KPMG LLP informed NXT that it declined to stand for reappointment as NXT’s independent auditor for the audit of the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023. The Company is filing this Amendment to: (i) Address an omission in the Original Filing: The Company did not include an audit report for KPMG LLP for the financial statements for the fiscal years December 31, 2022 and 2021, which audit report is now being included in the Amendment in Exhibit 15.1; and (ii)Include a consent from KPMG LLP as Exhibit 15.5. Except as described above, no other changes have been made to the Original Filing. Otherwise, this Amendment speaks as of the date of the Original Filing, and does not modify, amend or update any other item or disclosures in the Original Filing. As such, this Amendment does not reflect events occurring after the filing of the Original Filing or modify or update those disclosures affected by subsequent events. The Company’s Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer are providing currently dated revised certifications as Exhibits 12.1, 12.2, 13.1 and 13.2 in connection with this Amendment.

property.name: label
property.value: Expected Dividends Paid Per Common Share

property.value: Expected Dividends Paid Per Common Share
